mastery.subtitle: Distribution of all your cards by learning stages

forecast.title: Review Forecast
forecast.subtitle: How many cards are scheduled for the next 7 days

recall.placeholder: Recall Quality chart will be here soon

auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again to continue.
auth.subtitle: Use your Google Account for quick and secure login
auth.errorMsg: Failed to log in via Google. Check the console.

dashboard.title: My Decks
dashboard.noDecks: You don't have any decks yet. Create your first one!

stories.title: My Stories
stories.noStoriesTitle: You don't have any stories yet.
stories.noStoriesDesc: Go to any deck and click the 'Story' button to let AI write one for you.
loadingMessages: AI is sharpening its pencils for your story...
Coming up with some juicy plot twists...
Picking the best words for your level...
Almost there! Grab a coffee, the story is on its way...
Searching for inspiration in the dictionaries...

storyReader.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this story?
storyReader.deleteConfirmMsg: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this story?
storyReader.addSuccess: Word successfully added to the deck!

study.emptyTitle: There are no cards to study in this deck today. 📭
study.emptyDesc: You have already reviewed all available words, or the deck is empty.
study.successDesc: You have completed all scheduled cards for today.
study.thinkHint: Think about the translation before revealing the card

createDeck.title: Create a New Deck
createDeck.subtitle: Name your deck and select the languages you want to study.

editDeck.title: Deck Settings
editDeck.limitsTooltip: We recommend 15-20 new words and 50-100 reviews per day. Larger limits may lead to overload.

addCard.title: Add New Card
addCard.aiHintOn: AI will create a natural sentence matching your proficiency level.
addCard.aiHintOff: Card will be saved quickly, with just the word and translation.

story.title: New Story
story.description: AI will use up to 10 random words from this deck to create a unique text at your proficiency level.
story.waitMsg: AI is writing the story... This may take up to 15 seconds.

deleteDeck.title: Delete Deck?
deleteDeck.messagePart1: Are you sure you want to delete the deck
deleteDeck.messagePart2: ? All cards, generated sentences, and your progress will be permanently lost.

errors.aiServiceOverloaded: The story generation service is currently overloaded. Please try again in 1-2 minutes.
errors.noServerResponse: Could not connect to the server. Please check if the backend is running.
errors.timeout: Response timeout. The AI is taking too long to reply.
errors.unknown: An error occurred. Please try again later.

classrooms.emptyStudent: You haven't joined any classrooms yet.

errors.notFound: Classroom not found. Check the code.
errors.alreadyJoined: You have already joined this class.
errors.teacherConflict: A teacher cannot be a student in their own class.
